name: Ray Sigorta Anonim Sirketi
summary: Ray Sigorta Anonim Sirketi engages in the non-life insurance business in Turkey. Its insurance products include accident, health, motor vehicles, air vehicles, water vehicles, transportation, fire and natural disasters, general loss, credit, financial losses, and legal protection; home insurance; and motor third party liability insurance. The company offers its products through agencies, bank branches, brokers, and leasing companies. It serves through 1.303 authorized agencies, 98 agency brances, 50 Alternatif Bank branches, 71 Fibabanka branches, 92 broker, and 9 broker branches. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Ray Sigorta Anonim Sirketi operates as a subsidiary of ATBIH GmbH.
